lines.en_lit: But according to that version in which you said disagree granted, according to the one, who said is not indispensable, whose is this It is Rabbi Yehuda.
However, according to the one, who said is indispensable, whose this teach it is a mitzva to place

Come hear It is a mitzva to draw the lots and to confess If he did not draw the lots did not confess, valid. And if you say: So too, to place say, the latter clause Rabbi Shimon says: If he does not draw the lots, it is valid. If he does not confess, it is invalid?

what He did not draw the lots? If we say he did not place by inference Rabbi Shimon holds drawing is indispensable. wasn’t it taught one of them died, is brought counterpart without drawing lots; this is the statement of Rabbi Shimon.

Rabbi Shimon did not know what the Sages were saying, this is he is saying: If Drawing of the lots, you are saying actual drawing of the lots I disagree with you with regard to one if, Drawing of the lots, you are saying placing I disagree with you with regard to two
Come hear the bull disqualifies the goat,
the goat does not disqualify the bull; applies to the applications inside
Granted, the bull disqualifies the goat that if he advanced of the goat ahead of the bull, he has not performed anything at all. However, the goat does not disqualify the bull what is it
If we say that if one advanced applications of the bull in the Sanctuary ahead of the applications of the goat inside “statute” is written concerning
Rather, is it not one advanced applications of the bull inside ahead of drawing from sequencing is not indispensable, drawing itself is also not indispensable.

No, one advanced applications of the bull upon the altar ahead of the applications of the goat in the Sanctuary And is Rabbi Yehuda, who said: Matters that are performed in white garments outside are not indispensable.
But didn’t teach applies to applications inside
Rather, whose is this It is Rabbi Shimon, who said: drawing is not indispensable.
And if you wish, say: Actually, is Rabbi Yehuda. Granted, that sequencing is not indispensable; drawing nevertheless indispensable.
And follow their reasoning, as it was taught
